location.office_time_required: occasional travel for project or team in-person meetings

level_signals: 5+ years (7+ preferred) experience in product management
Mentor and influence teams across the org
Comp range up to $251,600 base consistent with Principal IC

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5+ years (7+ preferred) experience in product management
Proven ability to work backwards from customer needs, crystallizing problems that translate into impactful product decisions
Strong understanding of how B2B and large enterprises operate, including sales cycles and organizational dynamics
Technical skills: experience in APIs or platform products, including designing for reliability, scale, and developer usability
Soft Skills: Highly collaborative and excel in building cross-functional relationships in remote, global teams; able to mentor, inspire, and set vision for high-impact initiatives
Entrepreneurial: Scrappy and resourceful, comfortable rolling up your sleeves to get things done and drive impact
BS in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience building and scaling products or businesses, driving both zero-to-one innovation and high growth.
Advanced degree: MBA or Master's in CS or related discipline.

explicitly_excluded: surrounding areas of SF Bay Area

scope.surface: Twilio SMS and RCS APIs — developer experience and growth for messaging platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Developer adoption and API usage growth
Reliability and scale of messaging platform
Growth from betas and A/B test iteration
core_responsibilities: Define and own the strategy, roadmap, and execution for Twilio's SMS and RCS APIs, driving innovation while simplifying the developer experience.
Lead the evolution of our messaging platform, including launching new cross-channel APIs and evolving our legacy APIs at global scale.
Work backwards from developers and enterprises to design intuitive, consistent APIs that power billions of customer interactions
Gather market intelligence, analyze usage patterns, and synthesize insights from prototypes to innovate
Partner closely with engineering, design, GTM, and partner teams to scope, build, and launch capabilities
Drive experimentation through betas and A/B tests, iterating quickly to achieve product–market fit for emerging conversational experiences.
Use data and metrics to identify growth opportunities, performance gaps, and areas to improve reliability.
Mentor and influence teams across the org, championing a developer-first culture in a distributed, remote-first environment.

green_flags: Compensation ranges disclosed across multiple states
Clear product surface and ownership area (SMS + RCS APIs)
Encourages applicants without traditional career paths
red_flags: Role is not eligible to be hired in San Francisco, Oakland, San Jose, or surrounding Bay Area — unusual geographic exclusion for a remote role
Compensation note says info is provided 'for candidates hired in those locations only' while simultaneously excluding those locations — wording is contradictory and confusing
No visa sponsorship or work authorization information provided
7+ years preferred vs 5+ years required creates ambiguity about actual seniority bar

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Principal', comp range, and mentorship expectations)
scope.business_model (inferred from developer API platform description)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
ambiguities: Compensation note reads 'Please note this role is open to candidates outside of San Francisco, CA...' and then provides pay ranges 'for candidates hired in those locations only' — the Bay Area is both excluded for hiring and listed with a pay band, creating a contradiction. Interpreted as: role cannot be filled in Bay Area but pay bands are shown for reference/compliance.
5+ years required vs 7+ preferred creates ambiguity about hard floor; treated 5 as hard minimum per schema.
base_range_usd populated with full range across all listed geographies ($171,120–$251,600); actual range depends on candidate location.
